profile_definitions.interpretation: Model reads the domain schema, solves on the first attempt, and the reasoning trace is connected to the plan.
Model rarely solves first, but successful repairs arrive early enough that IWSR remains close to SR.
profile_definitions.key_reference: Partially consistent with Stechly et al. (2023); verify via P(Valid|k)

profile_definitions.interpretation: Reported success is heavily inflated by retries; attempts look like repeated samples rather than correction.
Model appears to solve from surface patterns, with weak schema grounding and post-hoc reasoning.
profile_definitions.key_reference: Kambhampati (2024); Valmeekam et al. (2023) obfuscation test

profile_definitions.interpretation: Model understands vocabulary and local preconditions but fails at long-horizon sequencing.
profile_definitions.key_reference: Valmeekam et al. (2023) Phase 2; Dziri et al. (2023)

profile_definitions.interpretation: Model uses legal action names but lacks a coherent model of state transitions.
Model is not reading the formal domain; actions, states, and failures are ungrounded.
profile_definitions.key_reference: Valmeekam et al. (2023); McCoy et al. (2024)

plots.description: Polar radar chart of FASR, IWSR, Exec, IHR, and PAS — larger filled area means stronger overall planning capability.

reasoning_notes.interpretation: Model uses legal action names but lacks a coherent model of state transitions.
